FormTitle: Configure new client workspace with onboarding documents
AddDocumentsTitle: Select documents for this client’s package

NeedToContinue.Text: Need to continue in your developer Workspaces?

ApiDescription.CodeFlow:
This sample features
  • Create or get a workspace
  • Create workspace users
  • Workspace envelope
  • Workspace document upload
Code flow

See the Controller and the workspace source code.

Step 1

After the form is submitted, call the Workspace:list method to try to retrieve an existing workspace; if none exists, call Workspace:create to create a new workspace. The workspace ID is then stored for the next steps. Next, call WorkspaceUser:create to add users to the workspace. After the user selects documents and submits the form, call the WorkspaceDocument:create method to register documents in the workspace, then call WorkspaceEnvelope:create to create a new workspace envelope, and finally call WorkspaceUploadRequest:create to create an upload request.
